eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Yakima, WA; at 10:07 AM on MAY 10, 2019 Effective until 11:07 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System for Yakima County, Washington.  This system would bring you emergency alerts during an emergency.
